title: Vanilla Perfected
description: A compilation of Vanilla Plus mods & packs to perfect the Minecraft experience without drifting too far from the feel of the base game!
body:
# ![Vanilla Perfected!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86ac0e9fb6a33f234035e0a29ce7df3ebe593eaa.png)
### Aiming to enhance Minecraft while retaining that Vanilla feel!

**Key Features: Drastically increased FPS, updated HUD and UI elements, Mob Animations, New Minecraft Dungeons inspired structures, QOL Updates, and much much more! (see Gallery tab for more insight)**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/lDPWSrttiec" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Thank you to Vanilla Tweaks for allowing the usage of their Resource Pack in Vanilla Perfected!**

**Credits:**
**Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/**

## Why the name Vanilla Perfected?

Vanilla Perfected was born after frequent comments from my subscribers on YouTube requesting that I make a modpack consisting of Minecraft mods that I use in my videos. This project is entirely driven by what I as a player like to use in Minecraft, and has never intended to be anything more than that. If you've ever wondered where the word "Perfected" comes from, it's in reference to this pack being the "perfect" version of Minecraft for me personally!
